codeReview.summary: Both blocking issues from round 1 are now fixed: (1) transition_with_checkpoint now properly validates state transitions using is_valid_transition before performing the transition. (2) CheckpointManager is integrated into the orchestrator's agent execution flow via GeneratorAgent::with_checkpoint_manager().

issues.description: transition_with_checkpoint now validates using is_valid_transition before task.transition_to(). The validation check at lines 145-150 returns InvalidStateTransition error if the transition is invalid.

GeneratorAgent is now wired to the orchestrator's checkpoint manager via .with_checkpoint_manager(self.orchestrator.checkpoint_manager()). This enables checkpointing after each tool call during agent execution.

summary: The CheckpointManager feature passes review. Both blocking issues from round 1 are fixed: transition_with_checkpoint now validates transitions, and CheckpointManager is integrated into the orchestrator's agent execution flow.
